ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "trip_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the trip */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route associated with the trip */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp for when the trip was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp for when the trip was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode (e.g., WALK, BUS, RAIL) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the mode */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the mode */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legs" (
  "leg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leg */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the leg belongs to */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mode used for the leg */,
  "from_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting stop */,
  "to_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending stop */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the leg */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the leg */,
  "wait_time" INTEGER /* Wait time before the leg */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the leg */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the leg */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leg (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "actual_duration" INTEGER /* Actual duration of the leg (in case of delays) */,
  "actual_distance" REAL /* Actual distance traveled (in case of detours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legs_from_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legs_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legs_to_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric coordinates of the stop */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the stop */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stop is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the stop is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stop is located */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp for when the stop was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp for when the stop was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary mode of transportation for the route */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., every 15 minutes) */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the first trip on the route */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the last trip on the route */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp for when the route was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp for when the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_stops" (
  "route_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the stop belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop in the route */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" INTEGER /* Estimated arrival time at the stop */,
  "actual_arrival_time" INTEGER /* Actual arrival time at the stop (in case of delays) */,
  "estimated_departure_time" INTEGER /* Estimated departure time from the stop */,
  "actual_departure_time" INTEGER /* Actual departure time from the stop (in case of delays) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., commuter, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Timestamp for when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
